title: WD-40 Specialist Degreaser 500ml: Professional Strength Cleaner & Degreaser. Dissolves Stubborn Grease, Restores Surfaces to Pristine State
features: Powerful Degreaser: Tackles tough grease and dirt effortlessly, making cleaning a breeze
Versatile Surfaces: Suitable for a wide range of surfaces, including metal
Corrosion Protection: Formulated with corrosion inhibitors to safeguard surfaces from damage
Domestic and Industrial Use: Ideal for both domestic cleaning tasks and heavy-duty industrial applications
Safety First: Non-flammable and non-conductive formula ensures safe usage around electrical equipment
Fast-Acting Formula: Provides efficient cleaning power without compromising safety on various surfaces
Cleans away Oil, Grease, Dirt & Grime
Easy to rinse and leaves no residue
Smart Straw technology for wide area use or more precise usage
